description:
The quiz assesses proficiency in Node.js I/O, covering fundamental file system tasks, buffer handling, encoding, and advanced streaming techniques. It is moderately challenging, blending practical code snippets with conceptual questions in an encouraging, instructional tone. The format encourages learners to apply best practices for efficient data processing.
Topics: Node.js file system (fs) operations, Buffers and binary data, Character encoding, Readable and writable streams, Stream piping and backpressure, Performance best practices
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript knowledge who want to deepen their Node.js backend skills, particularly those preparing for intermediate-level Node.js roles or certifications.
